parameters.query: SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'architect_email'

SELECT json_build_object(
  'project_id', p.id,
  'project_name', p.name,
  'project_type', p.project_type,
  'location', p.location_address || ', ' || p.location_city,
  'collaborator_id', c.id,
  'collab_name', c.name,
  'collab_email', c.email,
  'collab_phone', c.phone,
  'collab_specialty', c.specialty,
  'collab_company', c.company
) AS data
FROM projects p, collaborators c
WHERE p.id = $1::uuid AND c.id = $2::uuid;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({status:'invited', assignment_id: $('Insert Assignment').first().json.id, role: $('Insert Assignment').first().json.role, deadline: $('Insert Assignment').first().json.deadline, collab_email: $('Build Email').first().json.collab_email}) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({status:'not_found', error:'project_id o collaborator_id no encontrados'}) }}
